falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows and consolidation; this signals the correction ended prematurely and the macro engine's bottom signal was false

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency in volatility would falsify the bottom formation, as the referenced August 2024 bottom featured VIX spikes above 20; this indicates no capitulation occurred and the 'HOLD' signal was wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid in bonds alongside the equity stabilization would contradict the bottom_2024_aug analog, which featured rising yields during the equity bottom; this confirms the pattern match failed and the macro regime is different

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
